name: circumpunct-ethics
description: Ethical reasoning and perceptual calibration for humans and AI. Four pillars (Good, Right, True, Agreement) kept alive by four virtues (Plasticity, Access, Curiosity, Validation). Includes cognitive virus diagnostics, performed-vs-lived ethics detection at any scale, steelman construction, and a restoration protocol for frozen perception. Based on the Circumpunct Framework by Ashman Roonz.
